subcodes.first_line: Thou art remembered before the Wronged One, and thy name hath flowed from and been revealed through the Most Exalted Pen. Render praise unto Him Who is the Desired One of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت لدی المظلوم مذکور و اسمت از قلم اعلی جاری و نازل حمد کن مقصود عالم را
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @meditation
